title: Tide Extra Compatibility
description: Adds Tide compatibility for fish, loot tables and crates from over 25 different mods.
body:
### This datapack adds compatibility between [Tide](https://modrinth.com/mod/tide) and fish from the following mods (Catchable, mostly bucketable, and listed in the Fishing Journal):
Click Here To See The Current Mod List - **[Upgrade Aquatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/upgrade-aquatic):** Pike, Lionfish & Perch - **[Spawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/spawn-mod):** Angler Fish, Herring & Bluefish - **[L_Ender's Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm):** Lionfish - **[Deep Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/deep-aether):** Aerglow Fish - **[Critters And Companions](https://modrinth.com/mod/critters-and-companions):** Koi Fish - **[Sully's Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/sullysmod):** Lanternfish & Piranha - **[Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves):** Lanternfish, Sea Pig, Tripodfish, Radgill & all Sweetish Fish - **[Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs):** Flying Fish, Blobfish & Cosmic Cod - **[Aquamirae](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquamirae):** Spinefish - **[BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend):** End Fish **(also [BetterEnd Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend-forge) and [BetterEnd NeoForge](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend-neoforge) works)** - **[Blue Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/blue-skies):** Grittle Flatfish, Municipal Monkfish, Charscale Moki & Horizofin Tunid - **[Mofus Better End / Broken Constellation](https://modrinth.com/mod/mofus-better-end-mofus-broken-constellation):** Axefish - **[More Critters](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-critters):** Blubberfish - **[Seafarer](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/seafarer):** Horseshoe Crab - **[Miner's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/miners-delight):** Squid & Glow Squid **([Upgrade Aquatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/upgrade-aquatic) is required to bucket them)** - **[Environmental](https://modrinth.com/mod/environmental):** Koi - **[Cultural Delights](https://modrinth.com/mod/cultural-delights):** Squid & Glow Squid **([Upgrade Aquatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/upgrade-aquatic) is required to bucket them)** - **[Crabber's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/crabbers-delight):** Crab - **[Collector's Reap](https://modrinth.com/mod/collectors-reap):** Clam, Urchin, Tiger Prawn & Platinum Bass - **[The Undergarden](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-undergarden):** Gwibling - **[Clutter: Bestiary](https://modrinth.com/mod/clutterbestiary):** Koi - **[Nether Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/nether-additions):** Lavacanth, Goldhead Wrasse, Pyrolithid & Ectocarp - **[Luminous: Overworld](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-luminous-mod):** Trout, Bass & Sunny - **[Wan's Ancient Beasts](https://modrinth.com/mod/wab):** Toxlacanth - **[Youkai's Homecoming](https://modrinth.com/mod/youkaishomecoming):** Lamprey - **[Unusual Fish Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/unusual-fish-mod):** Blind Sailfin, Hatchet Fish, Bark Angelfish, Drooping Gourami, Eyelash, Sailor Barb, Triple Twirl Pleco, Aero Mono, Amber Goby, Beaked Herring, Circus Fish, Copperflame Anthias, Demon Herring, Duality Damselfish, Forkfish, Picklefish, Sneep Snorp, Snowflake & Spindlefish - **[Fins And Tails](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fins-and-tails):** Blu Wee, Pea Wee, Banded Redback Shrimp, Teal Arrowfish, Swamp Mucker, Flatback Sucker, High-Finned Blue, Ornate Bugfish, Wee Wee, Vibra Wee, Night Light Squid, Papa Wee & all Spindly Gem Crabs - **[Rainbow Reef](https://modrinth.com/mod/rainbow-reef):** Goby, Ray, Small Shark, Angelfish, Moorish Idol, Crab, Arrow Crab, Tang, Hogfish, Boxfish, Clownfish, Butterflyfish, Seahorse, Basslet, Pipefish, Parrotfish & Dwarf Angelfish - **[Aquaculture](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquaculture):** Atlantic Cod, Blackfish, Pacific Halibut, Atlantic Halibut, Atlantic Herring, Pink Salmon, Pollock, Rainbow Trout, Bayad, Boulti, Capitaine, Synodontis, Smallmouth Bass, Bluegill, Brown Trout, Carp, Catfish, Gar, Minnow, Muskellunge, Perch, Arapaima, Piranha, Tambaqui, Brown Shrooma, Red Shrooma, Jellyfish, Red Grouper, Tuna, Box Turtle, Arrau Turtle & Starshell Turtle **([The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) is required to catch the last one)** - **[Jellyfishing](https://modrinth.com/mod/jellyfishing):** Jellyfish, Blue Jellyfish, Bubble Jellyfish, Cow Jellyfish, Two-Fisted Jumper & Grease Jellyfish **(currently, it is not possible to put them in a jellyfish net)** - **[More Jellyfish](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-jellyfish):** Coal Jellyfish, Iron Jellyfish, Gold Jellyfish, Copper Jellyfish, Redstone Jellyfish, Lapis Jellyfish, Emerald Jellyfish, Diamond Jellyfish, Netherite Jellyfish, Smile Jellyfish, Honey Jellyfish & Skellyfish **(currently, it is not possible to put them in a jellyfish net)** - **[Fintastic](https://modrinth.com/mod/fintastic):** (Coming soon!)
Fishing Journal View ![Page 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/930a515e654da8b47e1b7b6a9ded785af71a1afc.png) ![Page 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5176d25fe5cf631140ef591ff7a01ef591442429.png) ![Page 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d65bc7921d8ba8b34d3df692c7667d69fca0ac12.png)
--- ### Added loot tables for the following mods to make these items obtainable:
Critters And Companions Although not listed in the journal, the Clam can still be obtained by fishing in rivers. --- ![Clam Treasure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/goMfyYSL/images/89be06e8a1450b37123a3539e8c7ed7fb8564487.png)
Unusual Fish Mod The following items can also be obtained in the appropriate biome if your fishing rod has the Unusual Catch enchantment.
Biomes: Underground, Deep Ocean, Deep Lukewarm Ocean, River & Dripstone Caves. --- ![Unusual Underground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/goMfyYSL/images/83d82319f20510c0b8e111e5c576447aff2566db.png) ![Unusual Deep Ocean](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/goMfyYSL/images/85c660e4cd2dfd4e4d785be5fa532cb424f887cd.png) ![Unusual Deep Lukewarm Ocean](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/goMfyYSL/images/169f2675da878d21724042753e0bd888f4651747.png) ![Unusual River](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/goMfyYSL/images/4a00d9511728911eb5db2db6dbfb35b746559591.png) ![Unusual Dripstone Caves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/goMfyYSL/images/03ce0ed704a893b453b264ac88f478456d5ff571.png)
Fintastic Fintastic compatibility has also been added!
While the fish themselves cannot be added to the journal (as they lack individual items), both treasure and junk items are included.
These items can be obtained in any biome marked as Duckweed, Anubias, or Hornwort. --- ![Fintastic Treasure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/goMfyYSL/images/511c181fef80cf3179996db5644d145ad0bcaaee.png) ![Fintastic Junk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/goMfyYSL/images/da091318be1c89bf050af83b9fec04bdfcab18b1.png)
BetterEnd Fishing in End water with BetterEnd allows you to get the junk and treasure items that the mod normally provides. --- ![BetterEnd Junk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/goMfyYSL/images/648743d2144787b826cd77295bcf879d84d15d98.png) ![BetterEnd Treasure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/goMfyYSL/images/1f66b15d46b8f4cd9ed55f3bc940986a4ed8cee8.png)
Aquaculture With Aquaculture installed, all items can be obtained in open water: the mod’s junk items, and Leech and Neptunium Ingots as treasure. --- ![Aquaculture Junk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/goMfyYSL/images/2264981d62631c6ea6a2975de2b95b109d687494.png) ![Neptunium Treasure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/goMfyYSL/images/f07b6b2b10aa4a542b222d5801e0d99f1c780963.png) ![Leech Treasure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/goMfyYSL/images/10ee6dc6e6f244eea0eb1b4a0796ae6ef58a103a.png) But it doesn’t end here! Thanks to Tide’s crate system, you can fish Neptune’s Bounty as one of them! (Also in open water) Temporary Warning: Due to how crate extraction works, there is a visual bug where Neptune’s Bounty is invisible when pulled out of the water. However, once it drops on the ground, it appears like a normal crate. This bug may be fixed by Tide in future versions. --- ![Neptune's Bounty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/goMfyYSL/images/39c21d1a2e13cd6e4e5e70fdb77835f5c44b5a77.gif)
--- ### Extra features: - Fish from the [Unusual Fish Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/unusual-fish-mod) can only be caught if the fishing rod has the Unusual Catch enchantment. - The Clam from [Critters And Companions](https://modrinth.com/mod/critters-and-companions) is removed from the Fishing Journal. --- ### If you are also using [Fishing Real](https://modrinth.com/mod/fishing-real) you should use this: [Fishing Real Extra Compatibility](https://modrinth.com/datapack/fishing-real-extra-compatibility) ---

⚠️ Warning: Official Download Sources #### Beware! My content is **only** distributed for download from Modrinth and CurseForge.
#### Any other site doing so is **NOT** me!
